prompt: Detailed RTL AI pipeline architecture infographic: inputs (origin.v, algorithm_origin.py, algorithm_new.py, uArch_origin.txt, uArch_new.txt) → run_surelog → uhdm_extract → build_graph → build artifacts (rtl_ast.json, causal_graph.json, pseudo_diff.json, uarch_origin.json, uarch_new.json). From there, branch to rag.db (SQLite) feeding orchestrator/flow.py (Claude) → outputs/new.v, bundle.json, analysis.md → Gmail report. Separate branch to Neo4j labeled 'graph analytics / visualization only – not in current RTL generation loop'. Clean English labels, engineering palette.
